question_prompt: Q14: If you could redo your studies, what would you choose?
panels: Q14: If you could redo your studies, what would you choose?
answers: I am content with my study path and would not change it
I would choose a degree in a high-paying field (e.g., tech, finance, engineering, healthcare)
I would learn a skilled trade or pursue a career that does not require a degree
I would pursue a creative or passion-driven degree
I would choose the same or a similar degree but from a cheaper, less prestigious institution
I would focus on entrepreneurship or self-employment

I would choose a degree in a high-paying field (e.g., tech, finance, engineering, healthcare)
I would learn a skilled trade or pursue a career that does not require a degree
I would pursue a creative or passion-driven degree
I would choose the same or a similar degree but from a cheaper, less prestigious institution
I would focus on entrepreneurship or self-employment
